svg.text: Market-signal replication: where raw market probabilities were under/over-confident, and which corrections survived larger-history checks.
1.2k history backtest: confidence correction is category-gated, not global
Avoid row-count illusions; use event-level robustness.
Source: CodexProphet docs/market_signal_replication.md + docs/market_signal_learnings.md; James Gui prophet-hacks repo cloned and checked; no original PNG/HTML graph asset found in repo.
